extension.name: plg_system_jsoptimize
extension.author: Novum Web
extension.copyright: Copyright (C) 2025 Novum Web. All rights reserved.
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later
extension.description: System - JS Optimize Plugin. Minifies and defers JavaScript loading for Joomla sites.

field.name: defer_js
field.label: Defer JavaScript
field.description: Add defer attribute to script tags.
